description: System architecture and design proficiency benchmark

tasks.input_data: A CLI needs to store user preferences locally. Propose a minimal component boundary that keeps file I/O replaceable.
tasks.expected_output: A preferences service depends on a repository port, with a local-file adapter implementing that port and the CLI depending on the service.

tasks.input_data: Design a workflow completion notification path that lets email and audit logging evolve independently without coupling the workflow runner to either implementation.
tasks.expected_output: The workflow runner publishes a WorkflowCompleted domain event through an event-bus port; email and audit subscribers consume the event independently.

tasks.input_data: Outline an architecture for a multi-tenant document API that requires tenant isolation, asynchronous indexing, and independently scalable reads.
tasks.expected_output: Tenant-scoped authorization and storage keys, a durable indexing queue with workers, and a separately scalable read API backed by an index that enforces tenant filters.
